The Real Story

I Came From Nothing.

Grew up broke. No safety net, no handouts, no connections. I clawed my way up and built businesses from scratch — a tattoo shop for 15 years, a tattoo supply company for 11 years, a Boost Mobile for 3 years, a barbershop, a pallet wholesale business. I was a professional body piercer. I have been an entrepreneur my entire adult life.

Then I went through a divorce and lost everything. Everything I had spent years building — gone. I had to start completely over.

Fast forward three years later, and I'm a month behind on rent, behind on electric, on the verge of losing everything — and 5 hours away from my 6-year-old son. Running businesses is not the same as building freedom.

I came into this with federal and state charges. A background check that closes every door. I was written off by the system. And I still built this from my phone.

Then I found Standin On Business. I invested $150 — one time — and got to work from my phone at home.

In my first 5 weeks I made $18,000 — verified. By month 6 — over $100,000* total across multiple income streams. The divorce took everything I had built over 15 years — gone. But I kept going, and I moved 5 hours closer to my son.

My total investment into this product that generated all of this? $150. One time. That is it. Less than the Jordans on your feet. One payment changed everything.

Let's Be Real

This Is Not A Get Rich Quick Scheme.

I'm going to be straight with you. This is not a magic button. Nobody is going to hand you money. If you buy this and sit on it, nothing will happen.

What this is — is a real education with a real blueprint. The same one I used to go from broke and starting over after a divorce to over $100,000* in 6 months. But I showed up every single day. I did the work when I didn't feel like it. I kept going when it felt impossible.

The people who win with this are not the smartest or most tech savvy. They are the ones who refuse to quit. They believe it's possible even on the days it still feels impossible.

If you are willing to put in the effort — this will work for you. If you are looking for a shortcut, this is not it and I would rather tell you that now.
